changeSet.author: p.meyer
changeSet.sql: create table if not exists gmdb.transcription ( id bigint generated always as identity not null, song_id bigint not null, pub_id bigint not null, details jsonb not null default jsonb_build_object('resourceId', gen_random_uuid()), constraint pk_transcription primary key (id), constraint uk_transcription_song_pub unique (song_id, pub_id), constraint fk_transcription_song foreign key (song_id) references gmdb.song (id), constraint fk_transcription_pub foreign key (pub_id) references gmdb.pub (id) );
